teaser: Merely days after the European Space Agency's Director of Space Transportation dismissed competition to its Ariane 6 from SpaceX's Starship, the European satellite launcher has lost one of its key contracts to SpaceX's workhorse Falcon 9.

title: Days After ESA Director Dismissed Competition From SpaceX's Starship, Ariane 6 Loses Customer To Elon Musk-Owned Company's Falcon 9
